name: mapreduce
explanation: MapReduce is the YARN ResourceManager check's MapReduce-flavoured sibling: the check hits the same REST API root (`ws/v1/cluster`, `ws/v1/cluster/apps`, `ws/v1/mapreduce/jobs`) on the ResourceManager (default port 8088) and then follows the application master URLs. The default deployment leaves the REST API unauthenticated. `cluster_name` is marked required in the spec but is a freeform tag (per the procedure rule, that doesn't force impossible classification). A single HTTP probe at `http://%%host%%:8088/ws/v1/cluster/metrics` is sufficient to identify the integration target, mirroring the YARN classification.
notes: Same caveats as YARN: Kerberos/SPNEGO-secured Hadoop clusters would force the integration into credentials-required mode. `cluster_name` is a label, not a discovery input.
